hero.title: Volunteer in the Moroccan Sahara
hero.subtitle: Slow down. Connect. Live like a local.
hero.paragraph: Welcome to Tagounite, a peaceful village on the edge of the Sahara Desert, where time moves slower and life is deeply connected to nature, community and tradition.

footer.title: Tagounite Sahara
footer.description: Authentic cultural exchange and sustainable living in the Moroccan Sahara.
footer.copyright: © 2024 Tagounite Sahara Volunteering Project. All rights reserved.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.thanks: Thank you for your message! We will contact you soon.

experience.aboutParagraph: This is not a typical tourist destination. This is a place to experience real desert life.
experience.whatYouCanDo: What You Can Do as a Volunteer
experience.activitiesIntro: As a Worldpacker, your days are diverse and flexible. Every volunteer brings their own talents — and we welcome new ideas.
